verbatim_text: It usually starts with a moment of silence. All right, why don't we get started? It's my greatest pleasure to use YouSoon today. YouSoon is one of our own. In fact, actually, you and I go back many years. We met in 2014 when I was faculty at WashU. And back then, I was teaching a graduate level class in machine learning. And there was one kid who always knew all the answers. Whenever I asked a question, there was one guy who knew it. No matter how hard it was, that was you. Otherwise, it would be a boring story. Oh, my god. So at the time, I was like, this has got to be a new PhD student. And I got to try to check him out and try to get him into my group.
